parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class Account {
  + AccountID : int
  + FirstName : string
  + LastName : string
  + EmailAddressUsername : string
  + password : string
  + AccountCreatedDatetime : datetime
  + isArchived : boolean
  createAccount()
  deleteAccount()
  editAccount()
  forgotPassword()
}

class Recipe {
  + recipeID : int
  + recipeName : string
  + servings : int
  + prepTime : time
  + cookTime : time
  + totalTime : time
  + isFavorite : boolean
  createRecipe()
  editRecipe()
  deleteRecipe()
  saveRecipe()
}

class RecipeImage {
  + RecipeImageID : int
  + RecipeImagePath : int
  + isArchived : boolean
  AddPhoto()
  DeletePhoto()
}

class Ingredient {
  + IngredientID : int
  + IngredientText : string
  + IngredientAmount : int
  + isArchived : boolean
  AddIngredient()
  EditIngredient()
  DeleteIngredient()
}

class Instructions {
  getSteps()
}

class Measurement {
  + MeasurementID : int
  + MeasurementText : string
  getMeasurement()
}

class Step {
  + StepID : int
  + InstructionStepText : string
  + StepNumberOrder : int
  + isArchived : boolean
  AddStep()
  EditStep()
  RemoveStep()
}

Account "1" -right- "0..*" Recipe
Recipe "1" o-right- "1" RecipeImage
Recipe "1" *-- "*" Ingredient
Recipe "1" *-- "1" Instructions
Ingredient "1" *-- "1" Measurement
Instructions "1" *-- "*" Step

@enduml
```
